set-variable.value: #[(3) as Number]
set-variable.doc:name: Set officeId

db:select.doc:name: Select datos estadoOficina
db:select.db:sql: SELECT office_id, temperatura_actual, iluminacion_actual, hvac_mode, hvac_target, light_mode, light_target, ciclos_estables, indice_perturbacion FROM estadoOficina WHERE office_id = :office_id

raise-error.description: #["No existe estadoOficina para office_id=" ++ (vars.officeId as String)]

when.expression: #[( (((vars.estadoRows[0].hvac_mode default "IDLE") as String) == "COOLING" or ((vars.estadoRows[0].hvac_mode default "IDLE") as String) == "HEATING") and vars.estadoRows[0].hvac_target == null ) or ( (((vars.estadoRows[0].light_mode default "IDLE") as String) == "DIMMING" or ((vars.estadoRows[0].light_mode default "IDLE") as String) == "BRIGHTENING") and vars.estadoRows[0].light_target == null )]

raise-error.description: #"Estado inconsistente en estadoOficina: existe modo activo sin target asociado"

db:update.doc:name: Actualizar estadoOficina
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE estadoOficina SET temperatura_actual = :temperatura_actual, iluminacion_actual = :iluminacion_actual, hvac_mode = :hvac_mode, hvac_target = :hvac_target, light_mode = :light_mode, light_target = :light_target, ciclos_estables = :ciclos_estables, indice_perturbacion = :indice_perturbacion WHERE office_id = :office_id
db:update.db:input-parameters: #[{ office_id: vars.estadoCalculado.office_id, temperatura_actual: vars.estadoCalculado.temperatura_actual, iluminacion_actual: vars.estadoCalculado.iluminacion_actual, hvac_mode: vars.estadoCalculado.hvac_mode, hvac_target: vars.estadoCalculado.hvac_target, light_mode: vars.estadoCalculado.light_mode, light_target: vars.estadoCalculado.light_target, ciclos_estables: vars.estadoCalculado.ciclos_estables, indice_perturbacion: vars.estadoCalculado.indice_perturbacion }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var e = vars.estadoCalculado --- { officeId: e.office_id as Number, sensor: "TEMP", value: e.temperatura_actual as Number, unit: "C", ts: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var e = vars.estadoCalculado --- { officeId: e.office_id as Number, sensor: "LIGHT", value: e.iluminacion_actual as Number, unit: "LUX", ts: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} }

logger.message: #["[apartado5-office3-publisher] Publicados sensores office3 -> TEMP=" ++ ((vars.estadoCalculado.temperatura_actual) as String) ++ " C | LIGHT=" ++ ((vars.estadoCalculado.iluminacion_actual) as String) ++ " LUX"]

set-variable.value: #[error.description default "Error publicando telemetría de office3"]
set-variable.doc:name: Set mensajeError

set-variable.value: #[error.detailedDescription default (error.description default "Sin detalle")]
set-variable.doc:name: Set detalleError

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- read(payload, "application/json")]
set-variable.doc:name: Parsear comando HVAC

db:select.doc:name: Obtener estado oficina
db:select.db:sql: SELECT office_id, temperatura_actual, iluminacion_actual, hvac_mode, hvac_target, light_mode, light_target, ciclos_estables, indice_perturbacion FROM estadoOficina WHERE office_id = 3

raise-error.description: #"No existe estadoOficina para office_id=3 al procesar comando HVAC"

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] --- { office_id: e.office_id as Number, hvac_mode: "COOLING", hvac_target: (vars.comandoHvac.target default 24) as Number, ciclos_estables: 0 }]
set-variable.doc:name: Actualizar estado HVAC: COOL_ON
Set accionOficina
set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] var nuevoTarget = (vars.comandoHvac.target default 24) as Number --- { topic_origen: vars.topicOrigen, tipo_variable: "TEMPERATURA", accion_realizada: "COOL_ON", valor_anterior: e.temperatura_actual as Number, valor_nuevo: nuevoTarget }]

logger.doc:name: Logger COOL_ON
logger.message: #["[apartado5-office3-hvac-listener] Aplicado COOL_ON con target=" ++ ((vars.estadoHvacActualizado.hvac_target) as String)]

set-variable.doc:name: Actualizar estado HVAC: HEAT_ON
set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] --- { office_id: e.office_id as Number, hvac_mode: "HEATING", hvac_target: (vars.comandoHvac.target default 24) as Number, ciclos_estables: 0 }]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] var nuevoTarget = (vars.comandoHvac.target default 24) as Number --- { topic_origen: vars.topicOrigen, tipo_variable: "TEMPERATURA", accion_realizada: "HEAT_ON", valor_anterior: e.temperatura_actual as Number, valor_nuevo: nuevoTarget }]
set-variable.doc:name: Set accionOficina

logger.doc:name: Logger HEAT_ON
logger.message: #["[apartado5-office3-hvac-listener] Aplicado HEAT_ON con target=" ++ ((vars.estadoHvacActualizado.hvac_target) as String)]

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] --- { office_id: e.office_id as Number, hvac_mode: "IDLE", hvac_target: null, ciclos_estables: 0 }]
set-variable.doc:name: Actualizar estado HVAC: COOL_OFF

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] --- { topic_origen: vars.topicOrigen, tipo_variable: "TEMPERATURA", accion_realizada: "COOL_OFF", valor_anterior: e.temperatura_actual as Number, valor_nuevo: e.temperatura_actual as Number }]
set-variable.doc:name: Set accionOficina

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] --- { office_id: e.office_id as Number, hvac_mode: "IDLE", hvac_target: null, ciclos_estables: 0 }]
set-variable.doc:name: Actualizar estado HVAC: HEAT_OFF

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] --- { topic_origen: vars.topicOrigen, tipo_variable: "TEMPERATURA", accion_realizada: "HEAT_OFF", valor_anterior: e.temperatura_actual as Number, valor_nuevo: e.temperatura_actual as Number }]
set-variable.doc:name: Set accionOficina

raise-error.description: #["Acción HVAC no soportada: " ++ ((vars.comandoHvac.action default "null") as String)]

set-variable.value: #[error.description default "Error procesando comando HVAC"]
set-variable.doc:name: Set mensajeError

set-variable.value: #[error.detailedDescription default (error.description default "Sin detalle")]
set-variable.doc:name: Set detalleError

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- read(payload, "application/json")]
set-variable.doc:name: Parsear comando LIGHT

db:select.doc:name: Obtener estado oficina
db:select.db:sql: SELECT office_id, temperatura_actual, iluminacion_actual, hvac_mode, hvac_target, light_mode, light_target, ciclos_estables, indice_perturbacion FROM estadoOficina WHERE office_id = 3

raise-error.description: No existe estadoOficina para office_id=3 al procesar comando LIGHT

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] --- { office_id: e.office_id as Number, light_mode: "DIMMING", light_target: (vars.comandoLight.target default 550) as Number, ciclos_estables: 0 }]
set-variable.doc:name: Actualizar estado LIGHT: DIM_TO

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] var nuevoTarget = (vars.comandoLight.target default 550) as Number --- { topic_origen: vars.topicOrigen, tipo_variable: "ILUMINACION", accion_realizada: "DIM_TO", valor_anterior: e.iluminacion_actual as Number, valor_nuevo: nuevoTarget }]
set-variable.doc:name: Set accionOficina DIM_TO

logger.doc:name: Logger DIM_TO
logger.message: #["[apartado5-office3-light-listener] Aplicado DIM_TO con target=" ++ ((vars.estadoLightActualizado.light_target) as String)]

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] --- { office_id: e.office_id as Number, light_mode: "BRIGHTENING", light_target: (vars.comandoLight.target default 550) as Number, ciclos_estables: 0 }]
set-variable.doc:name: Actualizar estado LIGHT: BRIGHTEN_TO

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] var nuevoTarget = (vars.comandoLight.target default 550) as Number --- { topic_origen: vars.topicOrigen, tipo_variable: "ILUMINACION", accion_realizada: "BRIGHTEN_TO", valor_anterior: e.iluminacion_actual as Number, valor_nuevo: nuevoTarget }]
set-variable.doc:name: Set accionOficina

logger.doc:name: Logger BRIGHTEN_TO
logger.message: #["[apartado5-office3-light-listener] Aplicado BRIGHTEN_TO con target=" ++ ((vars.estadoLightActualizado.light_target) as String)]

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] --- { office_id: e.office_id as Number, light_mode: "IDLE", light_target: null, ciclos_estables: 0 }]
set-variable.doc:name: Actualizar estado LIGHT: LIGHT_OFF

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.estadoRows[0] --- { topic_origen: vars.topicOrigen, tipo_variable: "ILUMINACION", accion_realizada: "LIGHT_OFF", valor_anterior: e.iluminacion_actual as Number, valor_nuevo: e.iluminacion_actual as Number }]
set-variable.doc:name: Set accionOficina

raise-error.description: #["Acción LIGHT no soportada: " ++ ((vars.comandoLight.action default "null") as String)]

set-variable.value: #[error.description default "Error procesando comando LIGHT"]
set-variable.doc:name: Set mensajeError

set-variable.value: #[error.detailedDescription default (error.description default "Sin detalle")]
set-variable.doc:name: Set detalleError
